_comment: Default MPPI hyperparams for ur5_push. With UR5Push.noise_scale = half_range = [3.15, 3.15], cfg.noise_sigma reads as a fraction of the action ctrlrange (matches adroit_relocate convention). σ=0.25 ⇒ effective per-dim noise std = 0.79 rad/s, matching the effective noise level of the old `noise_scale=ones, σ=0.8` config (so the commanded action magnitudes feel like the pre-fix setup). With λ=0.05 (sharp softmin), MPPI's chosen action ≈ best sample's noise, so action mean ~σ_eff. σ ≤ 0.1 explores too little; σ ≥ 0.5 saturates the actuator and overshoots.
